# Jasper Rädisch

> Software developer from Hamburg, Germany. Builds ATproto social tools — divepool (Bluesky discovery), PingArthur (LLM-first uptime monitoring), IsBlueskyDying (feed liveness/churn for Bluesky). Older background in Bitcoin/Lightning tooling and personal projects.

## Projects

- [divepool](https://divepool.social/): Discover Bluesky accounts and posts by topic. Semantic search over AT Protocol posts using embeddings, c-TF-IDF, and medoid-based clustering. Public API: https://divepool.social/api/v1/openapi.json
- [PingArthur](https://pingarthur.com/): LLM-first uptime monitoring. Prove URL ownership with a header echo, then poll status. The OpenAPI spec is the docs: https://pingarthur.com/api/v1/openapi
- [IsBlueskyDying](https://isblueskydying.com/): Feed liveness/churn score for Bluesky. Global or per-user.
- [sudokoin](https://sudokoin.com/): Solve sudokus. Claim sudokoin.
- [Brickshuffle](https://brickshuffle.com/): Pick random LEGO parts from sets you own.

## Articles

- [Keywords vs Embeddings (ATmosphereConf 2026)](https://divepool.social/presentation/PRESENTATION.html): Slides on ATproto-based social media discovery using embeddings, c-TF-IDF, and clustering.
- [Playing with the Lightning Network](https://raedisch.net/articles/satoshi_tennis): Building Satoshi Tennis to get a feeling for LND.
- [Thoughts about Bitcoin](https://raedisch.net/articles/bitcoin)
- [Come for the Price, Stay for the Education](https://raedisch.net/articles/bitcoin_community): The educated Bitcoin community (at least in Germany) is still small.
